data.text/markdown:
Calculate phenotypic activity

Compute mean average precision (mAP) replicability scores using copairs. mAP measures how similar replicates of a perturbation are relative to negative controls — higher values indicate stronger, more reproducible phenotypes.

Please use `implode` to return to previous behavior.

See https://github.com/pola-rs/polars/issues/22149 for more information.
  return sampled.filter(pl.col("Metadata_Plate").is_in(unique_plates))

data.text/markdown:
copairs mean average precision

Parameters: perturbations matched by Metadata_JCP2022, negative controls distinguished by pert_type. See the copairs wiki for details.
